title: skills england
description: A national occupational taxonomy platform and public API, commissioned to standardise how skills are classified across the UK labour market. Built with a full discovery phase and Meilisearch for fast, fuzzy search across a complex hierarchical dataset. Currently in public beta with 300 active users.

title: gatsby foundation
description: An AI-powered qualitative research platform that allows researchers to deploy interview agents capable of conducting hundreds of consistent conversations simultaneously. Under an initial pilot, the platform surveyed 200 students on AI usage in education, with findings directly contributing to a government report on AI strategy in education.

title: sainsbury trusts
description: A multi-agent IT helpdesk prototype built to automate first-line support across a large internal document estate. The system vectorises and semantically searches 200+ SharePoint policy documents, handles natural-language queries through a conversational interface, and routes complex requests to human agents.

title: ozeaon
description: An ocean conservation platform connecting project leaders with funding, expertise, and community support. Currently being built from the ground up as an MVP, with blockchain integrations supporting DAO governance and proposal mechanisms for decentralised decision-making around ocean conservation initiatives. Full platform coming soon!

title: itch film
description: Website for reputable London-based film studio Itch Film, known for acclaimed documentaries including For No Good Reason starring Johnny Depp.

title: yapli
description: A minimalist open-source chatroom platform designed for educators and workshop facilitators. Create temporary chat spaces where participants can join instantly without accounts, share links, and collaborate in real time using any alias they choose.

title: clark's
description: Website for Lyon-based 6-piece funk/pop band Clark's Bowling Club, with Spotify API integration, bilingual support with auto-detection, Three.js animations, and Google Sheets as a headless CMS.

title: wedgy music
description: Website for Leeds-based alt-rock band Wedgy Music, with Google Sheets automation for content management.

title: things we do
description: Mobile app providing therapy and symptom-relief for users suffering from behaviour control conditions such as Tourette syndrome, with offline-first architecture, data visualisation, and drag-and-drop interaction.
